#+JETPACS_APP: glasspane-views
#+JETPACS_APP_FORMAT: 4
#+TITLE: Glasspane views
#+JETPACS_PACK: glasspane 1.0.0

* Tasks
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 10
:KIND: records
:SOURCE: pack:glasspane/glasspane.org
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Headline) %TODO(State) %SCHEDULED %DEADLINE %TAGS
:COLTYPES: text text date date text
:FILTER: (todo)
:ACTIONS: pack:glasspane/heading.todo-cycle
:END:

* Board
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 20
:KIND: board
:SOURCE: pack:glasspane/glasspane.org
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Card) %TODO(Lane) %TAGS
:COLTYPES: text text text
:GROUP_BY: TODO
:FILTER: (todo)
:ACTIONS: pack:glasspane/heading.todo-cycle
:END:

* Calendar
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 30
:KIND: calendar
:SOURCE: pack:glasspane/glasspane.org
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Entry) %SCHEDULED(Date) %TAGS
:COLTYPES: text date text
:DATE_FIELD: SCHEDULED
:FILTER: (scheduled)
:END:

* Journal
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 40
:KIND: records
:SOURCE: pack:glasspane/glasspane.org
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Day) %TAGS
:COLTYPES: text text
:FILTER: (tags "journal")
:ACTIONS: pack:glasspane/journal.capture(value=noted)
:END:

* Backlinks
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 50
:KIND: records
:SOURCE: pack:glasspane/glasspane.notes
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Note) %TAGS
:COLTYPES: text text
:FILTER: id=note-hub relation=backlinks
:END:
